widgets_values:
AI cityscape vistas solve to the assumed 1.6m eye height
(scale_source=assumed_default) — roughly 10× small for this
elevated view. The 📐 dial sets 16m (calibrated for this plate)
and EVERY downstream metric follows.

Chaining derive nodes DIRECTLY would erase each other's geometry
(every derive strips prior PROXY_ROLE geometry by design).
AtlasMergeGeometry is the one explicit place branches combine;
solve_a's camera wins and the backdrop plane is deduped.

nodes.title: ATLAS PRODUCTION — TEMPLE CITY / LAYERED SKYDOME — PROJECT / GRAY REVIEW
CANONICAL camera move MP4 (enable after Bake)
CANONICAL camera path USD (enable after Bake)
CANONICAL SKYDOME — sky excluded from relief
CANONICAL 1024 CANONICAL relief + Taubin retopo smoothing

groups.title: 1 · PLATE + SOLVE + 📐 SCALE OVERRIDE — AI vista ⇒ assumed 1.6m is ~10× small
2 · ONE DEPTH, FOUR STRATEGIES — estimate once, derive four ways
3 · RELIEF + MERGE CHAIN — the Nuke-Merge-node equivalent, ×3

extra.workflow_name: ATLAS PRODUCTION — TEMPLE CITY / LAYERED SKYDOME
extra.description: Production path: measured elevated camera, sky dome, edge masks, retopology, Maya and Nuke review.
